text:
RT @9hills: 插件推荐：plannotator

可评论、编辑和共享的 Plan，结合 pi 好用（也支持别的 Agent）。

基本的工作流程：
1. /plannotator 实现xxx功能 
2. 生成plan，保存到本地并打开一个web评审页面
3. 类似 C…

There is tremendous alpha to be captured by starting a company outside of Silicon Valley. Too much consensus there. 

I don't think Varick could have been possible if we started in SF, instead of New York. We did move there after for talent but that was almost a year later.
RT @DJ_Mankowitz: Today Ethos announces our $22.75M Series A led by @a16z, with participation from @generalcatalyst, @xtxmarkets, @MattEvan…

We’re excited to invest in Ethos.

Ethos is building AI-powered infrastructure for human opportunity.

Using AI voice agents, Ethos captures the knowledge, expertise, and nuance that traditional professional profiles miss.

From there, it matches people to a wide range of https://t.co/mkxeHwPash

See how easy it is to build interactive dashboards in Open Design👀🤩

Now that we supports both Hyperframes & Live Artifacts, the only skill you need to do is CHATTING👉
Leave your city below. Every contributor is a hero we will never forget💪❤️

怪不得最近 面向完全不懂技术的 AI产品经理 概念这么火，产品经理 、 营销人员基于画布说几句话就把 App生成了，

其实 海外是有个 不差钱的傻鸟 https://t.co/KX99ETYPQO 在瞎J8烧钱投广告，帮着培育市场呢 ...
Sharing this so that hopefully it gets pushed to more people, shared further, the right people at Apple see it, and it gets fixed once and for all. Typing on iPhones is so annoying these days!
